name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement for sharing confidential information between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, capturing party details and key terms.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement governing the purchase and use of cloud-based software services.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-access product feedback relationships between a vendor and design partner.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining uptime commitments and remedies for cloud services.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement for engagements where a vendor delivers custom work or consulting to a customer.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement governing the processing of personal data under GDPR and other privacy regulations.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for on-premise or downloadable software products.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement governing referral and reseller relationships between two companies.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for time-limited product trials prior to a full commercial relationship.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement required under HIPAA when a vendor handles protected health information.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum addressing AI-specific provisions such as model training, data use, and output ownership.
